instruction: Find a large car from next Monday to Friday in Zurich, sorted by price.

evaluator.eval: check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_url_parse(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'parse_keys': ['locationName', 'dropLocationName', 'filterCriteria_carCategory', 'filterCriteria_sortBy']}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': {'locationName': 'Zürich', 'dropLocationName': 'Zürich', 'filterCriteria_carCategory': 'large', 'filterCriteria_sortBy': 'PRICE'}}})) and check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_url_parse(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'parse_keys': ['puDay', 'puMonth', 'puYear', 'doDay', 'doMonth', 'doYear']}), get_rule_relativeTime())
